content.text:
Based on my analysis of the molecule, I can now identify the neighbour atoms of atom C:14.

## Results

**Atom 14 (Carbon)** is covalently connected to the following neighbour atoms:

| Atomic Index | Element |
|--------------|---------|
| 18 | N (Nitrogen) |
| 13 | C (Carbon) |
| 15 | C (Carbon) |

**Geomconf_index: 8597**

From the zoomed view, I can clearly see that the carbon atom at index 14 is part of a benzene-like ring structure and has three covalent connections:
1. **N:18** - A nitrogen atom (blue color)
2. **C:13** - A carbon atom (part of the same ring)
3. **C:15** - Another carbon atom (part of the same ring, fused to another ring)

question: Please find the neighbour atoms of the atom with atomic index 14, whose element should be C. Here, neighbour atoms are defined as atoms that are covalently connected to this atom. Report all neighbour atoms by listing their atomic index (as shown in the image) and their element. Also return the geomconf_index for this molecule.
